name: GROMACS Molecular Dynamics (Cookbook)
description: The official gromacs/gromacs image (CUDA-enabled build, runs fine CPU-only too if no GPU is allocated), no custom Dockerfile. Pull the registry image from LabPod Images after importing, then enable. Terminal-only - run gmx commands through LabPod's Terminal. See github.com/LabPod/labpod-cookbook/tree/main/gromacs-md.
